character.definition: dwell, to live in a depraved (crude; vulgar; inferior) place
strabismus; squint, to look askance; to ogle, (a dialect) bright; light; brilliant, bright eyes
good, fine pig; an ancient term for pigs used in Liangzhou
sound of carts or stones (big things) knocking together, cross-bar in the rear of a carriage
take part in, intervene; ginseng; 21st lunar mansion, determinative star ζ Orionis (Alnitak)
dry over slow fire; bake; roast
happiness; good fortune good luck; blessing; bliss
stomach; gizzard of fowl; 17th lunar mansion, determinative star 35 Arietis
